text.title: Swipe File Tweet Hooks Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Swipe File Tweet Hooks output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: ≥20 hooks with shape + source + author + baseline

forbidden.pattern: any entry missing source_url OR author_handle
any entry verbatim-copied into operator's own posts log

allowed-transformations.transformation: Allowed to mark entries 'stale' when source_url 404s; never delete attribution.
Allowed to split a hook into shape + variant when adapting.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
